response:
<<BOOK PUBLICATION DECISION>>

Sec. 1  
[THE WRITER HAS TWO PUBLISHERS]  
[OFFER FROM PUBLISHER A]  
[OFFER FROM PUBLISHER B]  

Sec. 2  
[LET X REPRESENT SALES REVENUE]  
[FLAT FEE PLUS PERCENTAGE]  
[COMPARISON OF TWO OFFERS]  

Sec. 3  
[INCOME FROM PUBLISHER A]  
[INCOME FROM PUBLISHER B]  
[INEQUALITY TO FIND BETTER OPTION]  

Sec. 4  
[SET UP INEQUALITY]  
[FLAT FEE PLUS 5%]  
[FLAT FEE PLUS 10%]  

Sec. 5  
[COMPARE TWO EXPRESSIONS]  
[5% OF X MINUS 10% OF X]  
[RESULT OF SUBTRACTION]  

Sec. 6  
[COMMITTEE DECIDES BEST OPTION]  
[SALES REVENUE RANGE IS NEEDED]  
[BOOK SALES BETWEEN 10K AND 40K]  

Sec. 7  
[SOLVE INEQUALITY]  
[FLAT FEE DIFFERENCE IS 1500]  
[RESULTING INEQUALITY]  

Sec. 8  
[BOOK SALES MUST EXCEED 15K]  
[FLAT FEE PLUS 5% IS BETTER]  
[DECISION BASED ON SALES RANGE]
